title: lamiastrum galeobdolon subsp. montanum
intro: Lamiastrum galeobdolon subsp. montanum, commonly known as Mountain Lamium or Yellow Archangel, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Lamiastrum galeobdolon subsp. montanum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
